Our Story

A Legacy Born in 1947

From a humble shop to Thane's most-loved general store — Janata Stores has served generations of families with fresh groceries, premium dry fruits, and organic spices.

What We Offer

Quality You Can Taste

Spices, nuts, and groceries — sourced fresh, priced fairly, every single day.

🌿 Organic
Premium Masalas
Tandoori, Peri Peri, Udupi Sambar, Chai Masala & more — handcrafted organic spice blends.
🥜 Wholesale
Premium Cashews
W240 grade whole cashews sold at wholesale rates. Fresh, creamy & nutritious.
💎 Premium
California Almonds
Large whole almonds at competitive prices — perfect for daily health or gifting.
